scripts.pages:build: npx @cloudflare/next-on-pages && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = '.vercel/output/static/_routes.json'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { const r = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path)); if (!r.exclude.includes('/_next/*')) { r.exclude.push('/_next/*'); fs.writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(r)); console.log('Patched _routes.json'); } }"
